title: Wave 2: deprecation header convention (structural root)
description: Establishes a machine-readable deprecation header convention for canonical schemas, so deprecation status is queryable from disk and CI can act on it. Structural root for Wave 2: the absence of this convention is the underlying cause that surfaced as Wave 1 (workflow validating against a schema with no deprecation signal). Defines the header shape, where it lives (top-level on each schema), and how downstream tools (luhtech-schema CLI, refs rebuild, CI workflows) read and act on it. Does not change any schema content; only adds the convention spec.

outputs.description: Author schemas/deprecation-header.schema.json defining the header shape (status enum: active | deprecated | retired; supersededBy; deprecatedDate; rationale; archiveLocation if retired). Header is referenced via $ref from canonical schemas in their root properties block.
acceptanceCriteria: Header shape includes: status enum, supersededBy (optional), deprecatedDate (date format), rationale (string), archiveLocation (optional, used when status=retired)
Schema lands at schemas/deprecation-header.schema.json with proper $id (https://schemas.luh.tech/deprecation-header.schema.json)
refs rebuild --check exit 0 after schema lands

outputs.description: Pilot integration on one canonical schema (venture-summary.schema.json) — add deprecation header at root with status=deprecated, supersededBy=null (no replacement), rationale citing D7 (2026-05-17). Proves the convention works end-to-end without changing any data.
acceptanceCriteria: venture-summary.schema.json carries a deprecation header conforming to deprecation-header.schema.json
Header values: status=deprecated, deprecatedDate=2026-05-17, rationale references D7
venture-summary.schema.json still validates against its own meta-schema

preMerge: ajv-cli@5 validates this DELIVERABLE.json instance against deliverable.schema.json v1.0.0
venture-summary.schema.json post-header-add still validates as draft-07 schema
postMerge: Header convention queryable: any schema's deprecation status readable via jq or python without bespoke parsing
Convention referenced by downstream FUs (FU-LUHTECH-SCHEMA-DEPRECATE-SUBCOMMAND ties to this)

transitions.trigger: Wave 2 structural-root spec authored alongside parent deck-sweep instance

notes: Structural root for Wave 2. Wave 1's underlying cause (workflow lacked deprecation signal) gets cured by this convention. Once landed, Wave 2 siblings (canonical-schema-authoring, archive-directory, portfolio-venture-summary-archival) and Wave 3 tooling can act on the header. Single-repo scope; greenfield schema file.
